likely_response.translation_en: Along the pier, to the right.

responses.english: Along the pier, to the right.

phrases.text_local: Scusi, dov'è l'accesso alla spiaggia, per favore?
phrases.pronunciation: SKOO-zee, doh-VEH lac-CHES-so AL-lah spyah-JAH, per fah-VOH-reh

likely_response.translation_en: At the end, after the restaurants.

responses.english: At the end, after the restaurants.

phrases.text_local: Buongiorno, è possibile noleggiare una barca qui?
phrases.pronunciation: bwon-JOR-noh eh pos-SEE-bee-leh noh-LED-jah-reh OO-nah BAR-kah kwee

likely_response.local: Sì, vada alla biglietteria vicino al molo.
likely_response.pronunciation: SÌ VAH-dah AHL-lah beej-lee-eht-teh-REE-ah vee-CHEE-noh AHL MOH-loh
likely_response.translation_en: Yes, go to the ticket office near the dock.

responses.english: Yes, go to the ticket office near the dock.
responses.phonetic: SÌ VAH-dah AHL-lah beej-lee-eht-teh-REE-ah vee-CHEE-noh AHL MOH-loh
responses.french: Sì, vada alla biglietteria vicino al molo.

phrases.text_local: Scusi, ci sono bagni pubblici qui, per favore?
phrases.pronunciation: SKOO-zee chee SOH-noh BAH-nyee poob-BLEE-chee kwee, per fa-VOH-reh

likely_response.local: No, non ci sono bagni pubblici.
likely_response.pronunciation: NOH NOHN CHEE SOH-noh BAHJ-nee poobb-LEE-chee
likely_response.translation_en: No, there are no public bathrooms.

responses.english: No, there are no public bathrooms.
responses.phonetic: NOH NOHN CHEE SOH-noh BAHJ-nee poobb-LEE-chee
responses.french: No, non ci sono bagni pubblici.
